vehicle_master_record.parts_catalog_fitment_note: Restoration parts were ordered against 1966 GHIACP and 64.5-69 catalog ranges. This is standard catalog grouping for this era and should not be read as a year discrepancy, but title year vs. catalog year must remain explicit in all records.

ownership_chain.period: Documented activity Jan 2015 through 2016 (Henderson NV), later Hurricane UT

vendor_registry.name: Raby Enterprises Inc (Aircooled Technology / Type 4 Store)
vendor_registry.specialty: Type 4 engine components, DTM cooling systems. Founded by Jake Raby, the most respected Type 4 builder in the aircooled community.
vendor_registry.current_status_note: Type 4 Store parts business transferred to LN Engineering in 2014. Aircooled Technology continues engine building. For replacement DTM parts today, contact LN Engineering's Type 4 Store.

parts_ledger.item_name: Type 4 DTM Stage III Cooling System
parts_ledger.notes: Core of the Type 4 conversion. Jake Raby's Down The Middle cooling system, Stage III kit. Handwritten note: will be shipped as soon as possible.
Blocks off mechanical fuel pump location. Implies electric fuel pump or relocated pump in final configuration. Verify against engine photos.
Type 4 spin-on oil filter, a native advantage of the Type 4 platform.
Adapts Type 4 dipstick for Type 1 chassis installation.
CNC waterjet-cut engine bay sealing tin for the DTM conversion.

parts_ledger.item_name: Alternator Stand w/ Billet Oil Filler
parts_ledger.notes: Confirms alternator (not generator) charging configuration with integrated billet oil filler.
DTM-specific belt. Record belt spec from physical part for future replacement sourcing.
Adapts Type 4 oil cooler into DTM shroud housing.
Throttle linkage adaptation for DTM shroud clearance.
Billet crankshaft pulley specific to the DTM conversion.
Hardware for sealing engine bay air management (rivets, riv nuts, grommet per Stage kit contents).
Step-by-step conversion instructional media. If still in folder, this is part of the car's documentation set.

parts_ledger.item_name: Fuel Filter Inside Tank, Original Style

parts_ledger.notes: Invoice annotation: 'customer says it will fit.' Deliberate cross-year adaptation, 67-74 part on a 65 car, consistent with the disc brake conversion noted in DOC-004.
Invoice annotation: 'customer says it will fit.' Front disc brake calipers supporting the documented disc conversion.
Likely hood release cable with black knob, 56-67 fitment.
Invoice annotation: 'customer says it will fit.' 67-74 part adapted.

parts_ledger.item_name: Seal, Fresh Air Inlet Grille, Pair
parts_ledger.notes: Backordered at time of invoice ('b/o please'). Confirm later fulfillment exists in folder.
Clear lenses, a deliberate style choice over amber.

parts_ledger.item_name: Hose, 7mm Blue Hydraulic Hose, per meter
parts_ledger.notes: Invoice annotation: 'one length 2 meters long please.'
Machined head openings to accept 94mm big-bore cylinders.

parts_ledger.item_name: Spark plug inserts, 1 head standard + 1 second oversized
parts_ledger.notes: Thread repair. One head has a 2nd-oversize spark plug insert. Important for future plug service: confirm which head/cylinder before any plug work.

parts_ledger.item_name: CC heads and cut for compression, cut .050
parts_ledger.notes: Heads flycut .050 inch to achieve target compression ratio.
Restores rocker geometry after the .050 head cut.

As written: .028 deckheight; piston cc's .015; head cc's .046; 94 x 71 with .028 deck and 61 cc's = 8.6 to one. The .015 and .046 figures are the builder's worksheet values; the governing summary line is 94mm bore x 71mm stroke, .028 deck, 61cc effective chamber volume, 8.6:1 static compression.
Master interior kit. Several subsequent 0.00 lines are components bundled under this kit price.

parts_ledger.item_name: Door Panel Clip Seal Set (56 pcs)
parts_ledger.notes: Bundled with interior kit.

parts_ledger.notes: Backordered at invoice date (B/O 1). Custom door panels in 56-61 style with 12 inch inserts.

parts_ledger.notes: Backordered at invoice date. Color spec: #56 Grey Velour. Key matching detail for any future headliner repair.

engine.platform: VW Type 4 conversion (upright, in Type 1 chassis)
engine.displacement_note: 94mm bore x 71mm stroke = 1,971cc, referred to as '2000cc' in build notes
engine.head_work: Valve job, opened for 94mm, flycut .050, spark plug inserts (one head has 2nd-oversize insert), Type 4 rocker spacer kit
engine.carburetion: Dual 44mm Webers (exact model unknown, presumed IDF, data gap)
engine.air_filtration: K&N oiled gauze implied by recharge kit purchase (verify)
engine.fuel_pump: Mechanical pump blocked off (blockoff plate in Raby kit); electric pump presumed (verify)
engine.charging: Alternator on Raby billet stand with integrated oil filler

cooling.system: Jake Raby DTM (Down The Middle) Stage III
cooling.description: Upright fiberglass shroud system routing cooling air evenly to all four cylinders, allowing Type 4 installation in a Type 1 vehicle without cutting the engine bay
cooling.components: Stage III shroud, oil cooler adaptor kit, 6 pc waterjet surround tin, air sealing kit, billet conversion pulley, DTM fan belt, right air hose, alt/gen stand mount bar

exhaust.system: Ceramic coated exhaust (manufacturer unknown, data gap)

brakes.front: Disc brake conversion. Calipers w/pads (KGPR 615-107, 67-74 fitment adapted), TRW master cylinder (KGPR 611-015, 67-74 fitment adapted)

interior.seats: Front pads 43-1515 x2, rear pad 43-1518, upholstery 44-1523 (66-67 sedan, 12 inch insert, 56-61 style)
